whistleblower_flags.flag: SECRET_KEY in repo is active credential — rotate immediately
Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is isolated to MindShift — foundational ecosystem risk.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Scaling Engineer", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/skills.py", "issue": "Unbounded pagination in GET /skills/{name} — risks OOM at scale", "recommended_fix": "Add default limit=50, require explicit offset/limit params, enforce max limit=500"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/services/zeus/assessment_engine.py", "issue": "Synchronous database calls in generate_assessment() — blocks event loop under load", "recommended_fix": "Rewrite with asyncpg, use connection pool, add timeout=10s"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/lib/api.ts", "issue": "API base URL hardcoded in multiple files — breaks multi-region deploy", "recommended_fix": "Move to ENV var NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE, use edge proxy routing"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/main.py", "issue": "No request size limit — vulnerable to body payload DoS", "recommended_fix": "Add FastAPI middleware with max_content_length=10_485_760 (10MB)"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/Feed.tsx", "issue": "Infinite scroll fetches next page on render — causes n+1 waterfall at scale", "recommended_fix": "Implement cursor-based loading with useEffect, throttle triggers"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/db/session.py", "issue": "Database session reused across requests — data leakage and connection contention", "recommended_fix": "Enforce dependency-injected session per request, close after response"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/hooks/useProfile.ts", "issue": "Profile data fetched on every component mount — redundant under heavy component trees", "recommended_fix": "Migrate to React Query with stale-while-revalidate, 5m cache"}, {"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/assessment.py", "issue": "Unindexed query on assessment_results.user_id — full table scan at scale", "recommended_fix": "CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_assessment_results_user_id ON assessment_results(user_id)"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/utils/logger.ts", "issue": "Client-side console logs include full error stacks — exposes internal structure", "recommended_fix": "Sanitize and redact before client log, forward details to server-side only"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/services/llm/provider_router.py", "issue": "Hot loop over LLM providers without circuit breaker — cascading failure risk", "recommended_fix": "Add tenacity retry with exponential backoff, circuit breaker at 3 failures"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Unbounded pagination in GET /skills/{name} — risks OOM at scale
findings.recommended_fix: Add default limit=50, require explicit offset/limit params, enforce max limit=500

findings.issue: Synchronous database calls in generate_assessment() — blocks event loop under load
findings.recommended_fix: Rewrite with asyncpg, use connection pool, add timeout=10s

findings.issue: API base URL hardcoded in multiple files — breaks multi-region deploy
findings.recommended_fix: Move to ENV var NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE, use edge proxy routing

findings.issue: No request size limit — vulnerable to body payload DoS
findings.recommended_fix: Add FastAPI middleware with max_content_length=10_485_760 (10MB)

findings.issue: Infinite scroll fetches next page on render — causes n+1 waterfall at scale
findings.recommended_fix: Implement cursor-based loading with useEffect, throttle triggers

findings.issue: Database session reused across requests — data leakage and connection contention
findings.recommended_fix: Enforce dependency-injected session per request, close after response

findings.issue: Profile data fetched on every component mount — redundant under heavy component trees
findings.recommended_fix: Migrate to React Query with stale-while-revalidate, 5m cache

findings.issue: Unindexed query on assessment_results.user_id — full table scan at scale
findings.recommended_fix: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_assessment_results_user_id ON assessment_results(user_id)

findings.issue: Client-side console logs include full error stacks — exposes internal structure
findings.recommended_fix: Sanitize and redact before client log, forward details to server-side only

findings.issue: Hot loop over LLM providers without circuit breaker — cascading failure risk
findings.recommended_fix: Add tenacity retry with exponential backoff, circuit breaker at 3 failures

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Security Auditor", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/skills.py", "issue": "RLS missing on GET /skills/{name} — allows enumeration of internal skill names by unauthenticated users", "recommended_fix": "Add @router.get(..., dependencies=[Depends(RootTokenHeader)]) to enforce authentication"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/main.py", "issue": "Missing rate limit on /api/skills POST — vulnerable to brute-force skill injection", "recommended_fix": "Apply fastapi-limiter decorator with 5/minute limit per IP"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/lib/api.ts", "issue": "API base URL hardcoded in client — risk of exposing staging envs in prod builds", "recommended_fix": "Use runtime environment variable VITE_API_URL"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/assessment.py", "issue": "Unvalidated input in assessment_id — susceptible to UUID injection attacks", "recommended_fix": "Add Pydantic UUID4 validation and server-side existence check"}, {"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "apps/api/.env", "issue": "SECRET_KEY present in codebase — exposed in git history and client builds", "recommended_fix": "Move to Supabase secrets, access via os.getenv('SECRET_KEY')"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/routes/AssessmentResult.svelte", "issue": "Direct DOM insertion of assessment feedback — risk of XSS from malicious skill output", "recommended_fix": "Sanitize with DOMPurify before innerHTML assignment"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/auth.py", "issue": "Incomplete OWASP Top 10 compliance — missing security headers (HSTS, CSP, X-Content-Type-Options)", "recommended_fix": "Add SecurityHeaders middleware with strict policy"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/profile.py", "issue": "Overfetching in /profile GET — returns full user object including is_platform_admin", "recommended_fix": "Return strict subset: id, avatar_url, account_type only"}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/lib/analytics.js", "issue": "Analytics tracker sends raw assessment answers — violates data minimization principle", "recommended_fix": "Hash answers client-side before transmission"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/zeus.py", "issue": "Missing RLS on GET /zeus/events — exposes governance logs to unauthenticated users", "recommended_fix": "Enforce RootTokenHeader dependency and scope to requesting user"}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "SECRET_KEY in repo is active credential — rotate immediately"}

findings.issue: RLS missing on GET /skills/{name} — allows enumeration of internal skill names by unauthenticated users
findings.recommended_fix: Add @router.get(..., dependencies=[Depends(RootTokenHeader)]) to enforce authentication

findings.issue: Missing rate limit on /api/skills POST — vulnerable to brute-force skill injection
findings.recommended_fix: Apply fastapi-limiter decorator with 5/minute limit per IP

findings.issue: API base URL hardcoded in client — risk of exposing staging envs in prod builds
findings.recommended_fix: Use runtime environment variable VITE_API_URL

findings.issue: Unvalidated input in assessment_id — susceptible to UUID injection attacks
findings.recommended_fix: Add Pydantic UUID4 validation and server-side existence check

findings.issue: SECRET_KEY present in codebase — exposed in git history and client builds
findings.recommended_fix: Move to Supabase secrets, access via os.getenv('SECRET_KEY')

findings.issue: Direct DOM insertion of assessment feedback — risk of XSS from malicious skill output
findings.recommended_fix: Sanitize with DOMPurify before innerHTML assignment

findings.issue: Incomplete OWASP Top 10 compliance — missing security headers (HSTS, CSP, X-Content-Type-Options)
findings.recommended_fix: Add SecurityHeaders middleware with strict policy

findings.issue: Overfetching in /profile GET — returns full user object including is_platform_admin
findings.recommended_fix: Return strict subset: id, avatar_url, account_type only

findings.issue: Analytics tracker sends raw assessment answers — violates data minimization principle
findings.recommended_fix: Hash answers client-side before transmission

findings.issue: Missing RLS on GET /zeus/events — exposes governance logs to unauthenticated users
findings.recommended_fix: Enforce RootTokenHeader dependency and scope to requesting user

perspectives.whistleblower_flag: SECRET_KEY in repo is active credential — rotate immediately

perspectives.raw:
{"perspective": "Code Quality Engineer", 
"findings": [
    {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/skills.py", "issue": "Lack of input validation", "recommended_fix": "Add try-except blocks for potential errors and validate user input"},
    {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/Profile.js", "issue": "Unused imports", "recommended_fix": "Remove unused imports to improve code readability and performance"},
    {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/models/User.py", "issue": "Type hinting missing", "recommended_fix": "Add type hints for function parameters and return types to improve code maintainability"},
    {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/services/Auth.py", "issue": "Potential SQL injection vulnerability", "recommended_fix": "Use parameterized queries or an ORM to prevent SQL injection attacks"},
    {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/Login.js", "issue": "Insecure password storage", "recommended_fix": "Use a secure password hashing algorithm like bcrypt or Argon2"},
    {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/utils/helpers.py", "issue": "Unused functions", "recommended_fix": "Remove unused functions to improve code readability and performance"},
    {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/users.py", "issue": "Missing authentication checks", "recommended_fix": "Add authentication checks to prevent unauthorized access"},
    {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/Dashboard.js", "issue": "Incorrect data rendering", "recommended_fix": "Fix data rendering to display correct information to users"},
    {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/models/Profile.py", "issue": "Missing docstrings", "recommended_fix": "Add docstrings to improve code readability and maintainability"},
    {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/services/Email.py", "issue": "Potential email injection vulnerability", "recommended_fix": "Use a secure email library to prevent email injection attacks"}
], 
"overall_verdict": "warn", 
"whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Lack of input validation
findings.recommended_fix: Add try-except blocks for potential errors and validate user input

findings.issue: Unused imports
findings.recommended_fix: Remove unused imports to improve code readability and performance

findings.issue: Type hinting missing
findings.recommended_fix: Add type hints for function parameters and return types to improve code maintainability

findings.issue: Potential SQL injection vulnerability
findings.recommended_fix: Use parameterized queries or an ORM to prevent SQL injection attacks

findings.issue: Insecure password storage
findings.recommended_fix: Use a secure password hashing algorithm like bcrypt or Argon2

findings.issue: Unused functions
findings.recommended_fix: Remove unused functions to improve code readability and performance

findings.issue: Missing authentication checks
findings.recommended_fix: Add authentication checks to prevent unauthorized access

findings.issue: Incorrect data rendering
findings.recommended_fix: Fix data rendering to display correct information to users

findings.issue: Missing docstrings
findings.recommended_fix: Add docstrings to improve code readability and maintainability

findings.issue: Potential email injection vulnerability
findings.recommended_fix: Use a secure email library to prevent email injection attacks

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/AssessmentForm.tsx", "issue": "Progress bar depletes in red on error — violates Law 1: NEVER RED.", "recommended_fix": "Change depletion color to purple (#D4B4FF) in ProgressBar component."}, {"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/lib/zeus-client.ts", "issue": "No energy adaptation logic present — Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing in all products except MindShift.", "recommended_fix": "Inject energy-throttling middleware that caps assessment length based on user's last 7-day focus score."}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/skills.py", "issue": "Skills endpoint returns full agent list even if user has reduced motion enabled — violates Law 4: ANIMATION SAFETY.", "recommended_fix": "Filter out animated agents when `prefers-reduced-motion` is true."}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/BadgeUnlock.tsx", "issue": "Badge reveal uses bounce+rotate+sparkle — violates Law 4: UNLIMITED ANIMATION.", "recommended_fix": "Replace with scale-only entrance, max 1.2x, gentle spring damping ≥14."}, {"severity": "MEDIUM", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/DashboardCTAList.tsx", "issue": "Four filled buttons visible at once — violates Law 5: ONE PRIMARY ACTION.", "recommended_fix": "Promote only 'Start Session' to filled; others to ghost buttons."}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/i18n/en/strings.json", "issue": "Contains 'You haven't completed your profile' — violates Law 3: SHAME-FREE LANGUAGE.", "recommended_fix": "Remove string; replace empty state with 'Ready when you are'."}, {"severity": "MEDIUM", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/CrystalCounter.tsx", "issue": "Counts up over 2s on earn — violates Law 4: UNSAFE COUNT-UP ANIMATION.", "recommended_fix": "Show final value instantly or animate within 800ms."}, {"severity": "LOW", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/AssessmentResultCard.tsx", "issue": "Shows '0 of 5 completed' — violates Law 3: SHAME-FREE LANGUAGE.", "recommended_fix": "Replace with 'Start →' when 0, otherwise show '3 completed'."}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/skills/behavior-pattern-analyzer.py", "issue": "MindShift-only energy adaptation model — Law 2 not propagated to other skills.", "recommended_fix": "Extract energy-adaptation logic to shared lib, import into all skill runtimes."}, {"severity": "MEDIUM", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/Confetti.tsx", "issue": "Emits 50 particles on achievement — violates Law 4: CONFETTI EXCEEDS 12 PARTICLES.", "recommended_fix": "Cap at 12 particles, duration 1.5s, contained within card."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is isolated to MindShift — foundational ecosystem risk."}

findings.issue: Progress bar depletes in red on error — violates Law 1: NEVER RED.
findings.recommended_fix: Change depletion color to purple (#D4B4FF) in ProgressBar component.

findings.issue: No energy adaptation logic present — Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing in all products except MindShift.
findings.recommended_fix: Inject energy-throttling middleware that caps assessment length based on user's last 7-day focus score.

findings.issue: Skills endpoint returns full agent list even if user has reduced motion enabled — violates Law 4: ANIMATION SAFETY.
findings.recommended_fix: Filter out animated agents when `prefers-reduced-motion` is true.

findings.issue: Badge reveal uses bounce+rotate+sparkle — violates Law 4: UNLIMITED ANIMATION.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace with scale-only entrance, max 1.2x, gentle spring damping ≥14.

findings.issue: Four filled buttons visible at once — violates Law 5: ONE PRIMARY ACTION.
findings.recommended_fix: Promote only 'Start Session' to filled; others to ghost buttons.

findings.issue: Contains 'You haven't completed your profile' — violates Law 3: SHAME-FREE LANGUAGE.
findings.recommended_fix: Remove string; replace empty state with 'Ready when you are'.

findings.issue: Counts up over 2s on earn — violates Law 4: UNSAFE COUNT-UP ANIMATION.
findings.recommended_fix: Show final value instantly or animate within 800ms.

findings.issue: Shows '0 of 5 completed' — violates Law 3: SHAME-FREE LANGUAGE.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace with 'Start →' when 0, otherwise show '3 completed'.

findings.issue: MindShift-only energy adaptation model — Law 2 not propagated to other skills.
findings.recommended_fix: Extract energy-adaptation logic to shared lib, import into all skill runtimes.

findings.issue: Emits 50 particles on achievement — violates Law 4: CONFETTI EXCEEDS 12 PARTICLES.
findings.recommended_fix: Cap at 12 particles, duration 1.5s, contained within card.

perspectives.whistleblower_flag: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is isolated to MindShift — foundational ecosystem risk.

{"perspective": "CTO Watchdog", "findings": [
{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/skills.py", "issue": "Lack of input validation for skill names", "recommended_fix": "Add try-except block to handle invalid skill names and return 400 error"},
{"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/Button.js", "issue": "Unused import statement", "recommended_fix": "Remove unused import statement"},
{"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/models/User.py", "issue": "Typo in docstring", "recommended_fix": "Correct typo in docstring"},
{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/serializers/UserSerializer.py", "issue": "Inconsistent serialization of user data", "recommended_fix": "Standardize user data serialization"},
{"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/utils/api.js", "issue": "Unclear variable naming", "recommended_fix": "Rename variables for clarity"},
{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/views/UserView.py", "issue": "Potential SQL injection vulnerability", "recommended_fix": "Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection"},
{"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/Header.js", "issue": "Unused CSS class", "recommended_fix": "Remove unused CSS class"},

{"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/utils/helpers.js", "issue": "Unclear function naming", "recommended_fix": "Rename functions for clarity"}
], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}
